facebook.caption:
794 reviews. 4.7 stars. And it's a pure veg Indian restaurant in Phu Quoc.

Krishna Garden on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the kind of place that surprises you. Fresh vegetarian Indian food, a menu that actually travels well if you're missing home, and a rating that holds up across hundreds of honest opinions.

Whether you're Indian, vegan, or just done with seafood for a day, this one delivers.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the food land at the table. Krishna Garden, pure veg Indian on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 4.7 stars across 794 reviews and somehow not on every tourist list yet. Your stomach will thank you.
